# AI Build Market

> A marketplace where people buy and sell AI-built tools, AI-powered businesses, prompts, ideas, and games. Listing is free; the platform takes a transaction fee only on completed sales.

## What this site is
AI Build Market connects independent sellers of AI-developed tools, businesses, prompt packs, ideas, and games with buyers. Every sale is a direct agreement between buyer and seller. The platform is a venue, not a party to the transaction, and is not responsible for the performance of what's sold after a sale completes.

## Categories
- AI Tools — software and automation tools built with or for AI workflows
- Businesses — AI-built or AI-automated revenue-generating businesses and assets
- Ideas & IP — unbuilt product concepts and specs
- Prompts & Packs — prompt libraries and prompt engineering packs
- Games — AI-assisted or AI-built games and game source

## Fees
Listing a build is free. AI Build Market charges a transaction fee only when a sale completes.
